problem id: 025abbbb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  11010101 -> 01000001
  11000010 -> 10000001
  11010001 -> 01000001
  00101011 -> 11000000
  00010000 -> 00000000
  00011010 -> 10000000
  11101010 -> 10000001
  01001111 -> 11000000

query: 10001100
predicted answer: 00000001
